sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
Highlands and Islands Airports Limited (HIAL) has published its latest annual report and accounts for the financial year 2024/25. The report details the operations and financial performance of HIAL, which manages several airports across the region.

HIAL airports play a crucial role in connecting communities across the Highlands and Islands, an area where aviation has been vital since the inter-war period.
